title: Forced Thai Rhubarb Som Tum
description: A grassy, crisp recipe for midnight cravings, featuring forced-rhubarb and katsuramuki-cut, halal-friendly, form=som-tum.
instructions: Pound the chilies and peanuts in a mortar and pestle until slightly crushed.
Add the forced rhubarb, katsuramuki-cut, and pound until slightly broken down.
Add the fish sauce, lime juice, and palm sugar, and pound until combined.
Add the chopped cilantro and mint, and pound until just combined.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Transfer to a serving dish and garnish with additional cilantro and mint if desired.
